questions.question: Describe the fetch, decode, execute, and writeback stages of a complete instruction execution cycle. What are the primary functions of the decode and execute stages?
A CPU executes an instruction with the opcode 1010 (addition) and operands A and B. Describe the operation performed by the CPU during the execute stage of the instruction execution cycle.
questions.hint: Focus on the arithmetic logic unit (ALU) operation

questions.question: Compare and contrast the fetch and decode stages of a complete instruction execution cycle. How do the fetch and decode stages differ in terms of their primary functions and timing?
questions.hint: Highlight the key differences in the fetch and decode stages
